Name: Radio Button Selection Frames
Author: Beennnn
Description: Coloured selection frames, corner notches and single-corner bevels to show which key is the active one in a radio-button group. Put a plain text title on a Stream Deck key, then set one of these as the key's selected/pressed state image: the title now sits inside a bright coloured frame, four corner notches, or a flagged corner bevel, so the chosen option reads at a glance. Transparent centre keeps the white title text crisp on every colour. 19 colours x 4 styles (frame, corner notch, corner bevel left, corner bevel right) = 76 icons. Pair with a multi-state MIDI plugin that supports exclusive-group state scripts — e.g. Trevligaspel's free MIDI plugin (se.trevligaspel.midi) on the Stream Deck Marketplace — so pressing one key shows its frame and clears the others. Open-source, built with the sdicons toolkit: github.com/Beennnn/stream-deck-icons
